features: 💫【Dream Catcher for Bedroom】A sort of dreamy feeling exists in the night air.The legend tells a dream catcher can filter dreams, only good dreams can go through the hole in the circle center of the dream catchers, flow down the feathers, and lead people to a wonderful dreamland; while nightmares will be trapped in the net, and vanish without a trace with the sun the next day.

💫【Handmade & Meaningful】White dreamcatcher is carefully handmade by talented craftspeople after studied the art of weaving perfect patterns.Each mini dream catcher is hand-made bit by bit, each piece has a slight difference, this is the meaning of handwork.Dream catcher Mainly adopt quality feather material, white color, delicate and dreamlike.The good dreams will go through the web to create a calm and lively atmosphere and to transport you into a sweet dream.

💫【Design and Dimension】We have carefully designed the dream catchers nursery decor with heart shapes, which match white feathers to achieve a more dreamy and attractive outlook. The diameter of the dream catcher is 15 cm/ 5.9 inches with a total length of 60 cm/ 19 inches (including the hanging robe), which is a proper size as a good looking bedroom decor.

💫【Beautiful Home Decor】Dream catcher with feathers is very easy to hang, suitable for decorating bedrooms, living rooms, windows, cafes, studios, wedding parties.The dream catcher is not only the best gift for girlfriend, wedding anniversary, child birthday, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Valentine's Day, Christmas, but also a perfect home gift.

😄【High Quality Service】Our aim is providing the best product and top customer service to every buyer friends. If there're any concerns with the product, and you can contact with us anytime, we will give you reply within 12 hours.
